age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 18-07-2026. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, up to 10/13/15 years for PwD (General/OBC/SC-ST).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Medical Degree in respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute
qualification.details: A post graduate Medical Degree in respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute. NMC/MCI/MMC State Registration is mandatory before joining, if selected.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Resident - Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67700 Per Month (Level-11, Cell No. 01 As per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA (if applicable).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Nagpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Senior Resident recruitment is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Medical Degree in the respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute. NMC/MCI/MMC State Registration is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 45 years as of 18th July 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 51 vacancies for Senior Resident posts announced by AIIMS Nagpur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates have to pay Rs. 250/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered to the selected Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67700 Per Month, along with usual allowances including NPA if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Nagpur Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and up to 10/13/15 years for PwD candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the AIIMS Nagpur Senior Resident recruitment must be submitted online through the official website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
